blocking_findings.summary: MVP bundles 3 ship-units (dispatch + escape hatches + constitution rename); carve rename to sibling spec, defer hatches/--explain
Codex lineage backfill (task 46) sequenced after resolver (task 12) consumes it; v0.10.0 MVP ships content-blind
Autorun gate-shell deps off-by-one: tasks 23/24/25 must depend on 14/15/16 respectively, not all 16
Task 7 (Agent-tool model precedence empirical) is plan-blocking but sequenced parallel in W2; move to pre-W2 gate
Orchestrator rate-limit path undefined; tier_policy.orchestrator=opus has no 429 fallback documented
Constitution rename 'both files exist' halt has no recovery recipe; ship migrate helper or carve to sibling spec

security_findings.summary: D7 fallback writes per-dispatch wrapper subagents to ~/.claude/agents/ — persistent prompt injection on SIGKILL, concurrent collision, path traversal at write site
_tag_baseline.py lacks NFKC normalization; Cyrillic homoglyphs (аuth) bypass SEC-02 baseline floor
Code-fence exclusion grammar unspecified in _tag_baseline.py; bidirectional hide/show keyword attacks possible
tags_provenance.baseline is author-writable; resolver must recompute and assert recorded ⊆ recomputed at every dispatch, not trust recorded value
